settings.mods.safe_mode_dialog.message:
Disable Safe Mode for mod "{mod_name}"?

Safe Mode protects your device. When disabled, this mod may perform high-risk operations such as file writes, which could lead to data loss or system issues.

Please ensure you fully trust the source and author of this mod.

Disable Safe Mode by default for all mods?

Safe Mode protects your device. When disabled, mods may perform high-risk operations such as file writes, which could lead to data loss or system issues.

Please ensure you fully trust the sources and authors of all mods.
